html:
{% for row in doc.table_bundle_details %} {% set parent_item = frappe.get_doc("Bundle Creation Item", row.parent_item_id) %}
Bundle Order No: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ frappe.format_date(doc.posting_date or doc.creation, "dd-MMM-yyyy") }} Sales Order: {{ doc.sales_orders[0].sales_order or "" }}
Cut Docket Number: {{ doc.cut_docket_id or "" }} Line item: {{ parent_item.line_item or "" }}
Colour: {{ parent_item.color or "" }} Work Order: {{ doc.work_orders[0].work_order if doc.work_orders else "" }}
Roll No: {{ parent_item.roll_no or "" }} Bundle Number: {{ row.bundle_id }}
Batch: {{ parent_item.batch or "" }} Size: {{ parent_item.size }}
Shade: {{ parent_item.shade }} Bundle Qty: {{ row.unitsbundle }}
{% endfor %}
name: Bundle Details - Barcode
